underlying_goal: Fix a UI bug where the 'Interpreting...' loading message was styled identically to person A's speech bubbles, making it look biased toward one speaker
friction_detail: User couldn't run the dev server for visual verification because another repo was using port 3000, so browser verification was skipped.
brief_summary: User asked to fix an alignment/color bug on the interpreting loading message, Claude made the CSS change, tests passed, and the PR was shipped with green CI.
